Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: robe with lightning patterns embroidered on it
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: unusually dark-blue hair, messy and unkempt
Alger Wilson.accessories: quirky-shaped glass bottle containing supernatural substances — bubbles, frost/snow, and gusting wind visible inside at different moments
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Described with a stoic expression on his rough face, and as the captain of the Blue Avenger.
Alger Wilson.era_clothing_lock: robe embroidered with lightning patterns, worn aboard a three-masted sailboat at sea

Jack.primary_clothing: Simple Victorian child's attire, likely a linen shirt and dark trousers, slightly worn from orphanage life
Jack.face_description: Round, youthful face with large, fearful eyes and soft, innocent features.
Jack.visual_anchor: 8-9 year old boy with soft yellow hair and a fearful expression, wearing a simple Victorian child's cotton shirt and dark trousers.
Jack.color_palette: soft yellow, linen white, sky blue, charcoal grey
Jack.source_notes: Chapter 53 explicitly confirms his age as 8 or 9 and describes his soft yellow hair.

Jack's Father.primary_clothing: Heavy black robes with deep shadows, adventurer-style travel gear underneath.
Jack's Father.face_description: Unforgettably sharp, chiseled jawline as if chiseled by a master artisan; expression warps into extreme pain and agony when listening.
Jack's Father.visual_anchor: Middle-aged man with an unforgettably chiseled, sculpted jawline and black shards protruding from his skin, wearing a hooded black Victorian wool robe.
Jack's Father.distinguishing_features: Unforgettable chiseled jawline; skin protrudes black shards when losing control; constant listening pose.
Jack's Father.source_notes: Significant physical description provided during his interaction with Jack and his 'listening' state.
Jack's Father.unique_identifier: sharp, chiseled jawline like a sculpture and black shards protruding from his exposed skin
Jack's Father.era_clothing_lock: hooded black wool robe with deep shadows, dark wool trousers, and sturdy black leather boots

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver-embedded cane, halved top hat, dark gold member cufflinks
Klein Moretti.role: Khoy University graduate and probationary member of the Nighthawks
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Officially joined the club; now wearing a halved top hat and club cufflinks.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: formal suit, white shirt, black trousers, halved top hat

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Identifies himself as a 'Mystery Pryer' and mentions the trait of temperance for the sequence.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: Middle-aged man with deep gray eyes and a black Victorian trench coat, always wearing a unique black top hat that appears split in half.
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Re-confirmed clothing details including the 'halved top hat' and 'black trench coat'.
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black wool trench coat, starched white shirt, black silk cravat, and a halved black top hat

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes with a tall nose bridge and a sagging philtrum; relatively mild bearing.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with curly black hair and deep blue eyes, wearing a grey wool frock coat and featuring a sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: deep blue, charcoal grey, snowy white
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Physical details (hair, eyes, tooth, philtrum) confirmed via Old Neil's magical portrait ritual; age and occupation confirmed by police report.
Ray Bieber.unique_identifier: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth and a sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.era_clothing_lock: grey wool frock coat, white linen shirt with a stiff starched collar, dark blue silk cravat, charcoal wool trousers

Daly.face_description: uncanny beauty with twinkling emerald eyes and striking blue eyeshadow; face framed by the hood of her black robe
Daly.visual_anchor: strikingly beautiful woman in a floor-length hooded black Victorian robe, twinkling emerald eyes accentuated by blue eyeshadow and blush, silver bracelet with white crystal pendant on wrist
Daly.color_palette: deep black, cobalt blue, silver, white crystal
Daly.distinguishing_features: Spirit Medium; prefers working with corpses; uses aromatic floral essences (Amantha, Eye of the Spirit) for mediumship rituals; can perceive and communicate with spirits
Daly.accessories: silver bracelet with white crystal pendant, waist pouch with glass vials
Daly.source_notes: Old Neil mentions she 'clamored to be a real Spirit Medium'.
Daly.unique_identifier: twinkling emerald eyes, hooded black robe with blue eyeshadow and blush, silver bracelet with hanging white crystal pendant
Daly.era_clothing_lock: floor-length hooded black robe, blue eyeshadow and rouge blush, exposed silver bracelet with white crystal pendant at wrist, waist pouch holding glass vials

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.role: Accountant and administrator for the Blackthorn Security Company
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Appears in the reception hall wearing a light-green dress with her hair coiled fashionably and carrying a small leather handbag.
Mrs. Orianna.era_clothing_lock: elegant light-green Victorian day dress with a tailored bodice and structured silhouette, fashionably coiled hair secured with ornate pins, carrying a small leather handbag

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Explicitly described as brown-haired and wearing a casual cream-colored dress.
Rozanne.era_clothing_lock: light green Victorian-style dress accentuated with beautiful lace on the sleeves, collar, and chest

Angelica.hair_style: long hair coiled in a mature, elegant style
Angelica.visual_anchor: mature and elegant woman with brownish-yellow long hair coiled, wearing a Victorian attendant's outfit
Angelica.source_notes: Described as a beautiful lady with a pleasant smile in Chapter 49.

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: frail male with soft blond hair and a monocle hanging over a formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: Chapter 49 provides specific details: soft blond hair, monocle, black bow tie, and a formal suit.
Glacis.era_clothing_lock: formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie, monocle hanging from a chain, polished leather shoes

The Creator.primary_clothing: none, body composed of land and stars
The Creator.face_description: A cosmic visage where one eye is a burning sun and the other a blood-red moon, framed by the void of space.
The Creator.visual_anchor: Eternal cosmic being, one eye is the sun and the other is the crimson moon, body merging into the land and stars
The Creator.color_palette: golden yellow, crimson red, deep space black, starlight white
The Creator.distinguishing_features: Eyes are celestial bodies; body is the universe itself
The Creator.source_notes: Mentioned in the creation myth; physical description based on the myth's details.

Earth Mother.primary_clothing: Flowing emerald and brown gown decorated with floral patterns and wheat stalks
Earth Mother.face_description: Warm and maternal face with soft features and eyes the color of a lush forest.
Earth Mother.visual_anchor: Maternal female deity, olive skin, long wavy brown hair with flower crown, wearing emerald green gown
Earth Mother.color_palette: emerald green, earth brown, wheat gold
Earth Mother.distinguishing_features: Appeared during the Third Epoch (Cataclysm Epoch).
Earth Mother.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions appearance in the Third Epoch.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Old Neil explains the Goddess's titles and correspondences during the ritual in Chapter 51.
